item.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle Collectible Building Toy for Kids with 4 Character Minifigures Creative Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Boys and Girls 75386
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle Collectible Building Toy for Kids with 4 Character Minifigures Creative Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Boys and Girls 75386 here:

ℹ️:

  • LEGO Star Wars buildable toy – Relive a scene from Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season 3 with this Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle set
  • Interactive digital building – Using the LEGO Builder app, kids can zoom in, rotate and visualise a digital version of this model as they build
  • LEGO Star Wars set – The base in this set has an armoured door with a slam-shut trigger and control panels, plus a rotating, stud-shooting turret
  • Accessories – A heavy blaster for Paz Vizsla, a jetpack for Moff Gideon, weapons for the Praetorian Guards, plus a box containing a thermal detonator
  • Build and connect – The Mandalorian base in this LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian collectible set connects to the buildable rock/cave in the (75373) Ambush on Mandalore Battle Pack, sold separately
  • Star Wars: The Mandalorian gift idea for kids – This LEGO creative toy makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift for 7+-year-old boys, girls and any young Star Wars: The Mandalorian fan
  • 4 collectible LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian minifigures – Characters Paz Vizsla, Moff Gideon and 2 Imperial Praetorian Guards

🛒 Buy it now!!

item.title: LEGO Fortnite Klombo Toy - Play & Display Dino Figure with Oro and Island Peely Minifigures - Gift for 10+ Year Old Boys Girls & Gaming Fans - 77077
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO Fortnite Klombo Toy - Play & Display Dino Figure with Oro and Island Peely Minifigures - Gift for 10+ Year Old Boys Girls & Gaming Fans - 77077 here:

ℹ️:

  • Klombo figure with play features – Kids can build Klombo and explore its movable legs, opening mouth and rotating tail, then feed it Klomberries from the bush to make friends
  • LEGO Builder app – Digital instructions are available in the LEGO Builder app to allow builders to zoom, rotate and track their LEGO Fortnite model in 3D as they build
  • Fortnite gift for gamers – A great video game gift for 10+ year old boys and girls who love Fortnite toys, creative building sets and LEGO minifigures featuring iconic gaming characters
  • Buildable Fortnite toy for 10+ year old boys and girls – Build the iconic Klombo figure with this fun building set for gamers, collectors and fans of Fortnite figures and gaming
  • Discover LEGO Fortnite sets – Bring the gaming adventure into the real world with more LEGO Fortnite building sets (sold separately), great for creative play, gaming displays and cool desk decor
  • 2 LEGO Fortnite minifigures – Includes Island Adventure Peely and Oro minifigures that attach to Klombo’s back, sparking imaginative role play with favourite Fortnite figures
  • Bonus in-game item – Features a redeemable QR code for a bonus Fortnite Island Adventure Peely Outfit in the LEGO Fortnite video game, adding digital fun to the brick-building adventure

🛒 Buy it now!!

  • Cool kids bedroom decoration – After kids have raced the buildable LEGO model car, they can proudly display it on a shelf or bedside table

  • Fun accessories – Includes Dave’s weight-lifting bar, Secret Agent AVL Tim’s X-ray glasses, Pit Crew Ron’s dirty-nappy-disposal gun and much more

  • Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection – Discover a space for relaxation with the wide range of LEGO construction sets designed specifically for adults

  • CREATIVE ROLE PLAY – The Peppa Pig figures can hide in the trunk or relax in the branches of the tree house toy, which also features a hinged window
  • GROWS IMAGINATIONS – With this creative toddler toy, little ones reimagine scenes from the Peppa Pig TV show as they explore the garden and care for the toy plant
  • GIFT FOR TODDLERS – Treat a fan of the Peppa Pig TV show with this building toy, which makes a fun Peppa Pig-themed birthday gift for 2+ year old girls and boys
  • PACKED WITH PLAY STARTERS – This building toy comes with Peppa Pig and her brother George figures, a watering can, gardening fork, packet of seeds and a tree house toy
  • EDUCATIONAL TOY FOR KIDS – LEGO DUPLO toddler toys support fine motor skills and emotional development through fun-filled playtimes that make learning fun
